title: pouzolzia indica subvar. minor
intro: Pouzolzia indica subvar. minor, also known as Indian nettle or Indian wood nettle, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pouzolzia indica subvar. minor include treating fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
